title: Iran says limited cyberattack disrupts services at four banks, state media says

snapshot.title: Iran says limited cyberattack disrupts services at four banks, state media says
snapshot.description: DUBAI: A cyberattack disrupted services at four ​major Iranian banks, though no customer data was compromised, the country’s banking coordination council ‌said on Sunday, ‌according ​to ‌state ⁠media. The ​council said ⁠the attack targeted a shared communications infrastructure used by Bank Melli, ⁠Bank Tejarat, Bank ‌Saderat and ‌the Export ​Development ‌Bank of ‌Iran,
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Iran says limited cyberattack disrupts services at four banks, state media says | Arab News
